about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Empowering intimacy with quality and care
about.story: Founded with a mission to break taboos and promote healthy attitudes toward intimacy, we curate only the finest products from trusted brands worldwide. Every item in our collection is carefully tested for quality, safety, and satisfaction.
about.mission: To create a safe, judgment-free space where everyone can explore and enhance their intimate wellness journey with confidence.
about.quality_desc: Only the highest-grade materials and products make it into our collection.
about.discretion_desc: Plain packaging and secure checkout — your privacy is our priority.
about.education_desc: We believe in informed choices and provide resources for sexual wellness education.
about.community_desc: Products and resources for all identities, orientations, and experience levels.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information.

sections.infoContent: We collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, shipping address, and payment information when you make a purchase.
sections.usageContent: We use your information to process orders, provide customer support, send promotional communications (with your consent), and improve our services.
sections.protectionContent: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. All transactions are encrypted with SSL technology.
sections.cookiesContent: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time.
sections.rightsContent: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. Contact us at privacy@example.com for any privacy-related requests.
